evidence: A-L1H.0 showed S142 had high positive residual and many ge31 misses; A-L1H.2 selected P_ge31 still had recall 0.533 for S142 focus rows.
interpretation: S142 remains a high-tail miss / underprediction caveat.
forbidden_claim: S142 is causally corrected or fully solved.
recommended_handling: Track in model card and defer station-context correction to explicit A-L2 gate.

evidence: A-L1H.0 found low ge31 support at S139; A-L1H.2 focus rows had one event and high false-alarm tendency.
interpretation: S139 is low-support and unstable for station-specific conclusions.
safe_claim: S139 evidence is a caveat, not a basis for broad claims.
forbidden_claim: S139 proves calibration reliability or station causality.
recommended_handling: Treat station-specific metrics as diagnostic only.

evidence: A-L1H.0c found radiation_hot contained nearly all observed ge31 events and misses; A-L1H.2 showed P_ge31 bias was near zero in radiation_hot but still retrospective.
interpretation: Radiation-hot regimes are important diagnostic contexts.
safe_claim: Radiation-hot periods concentrate ge31 review burden.
forbidden_claim: Radiation-hot is a proven causal mechanism or operational trigger.
recommended_handling: Keep as caveat in report and future review gates.

evidence: A-L1H.0c and A-L1H.2 both flagged very_high shortwave and shortwave_3h bins as ge31/miss-heavy diagnostic regimes.
interpretation: Shortwave bins help explain where review is needed, not why events happen causally.
safe_claim: Very-high shortwave regimes are retrospective diagnostics.
forbidden_claim: Shortwave feature proves real-world causal heat-risk drivers.
recommended_handling: Use for internal caveats, not claims.

evidence: A-L1H.2 reliability bins and station rows include low-support pockets; A-L1H.1 advanced formula routes were unavailable.
interpretation: Some metrics are unstable outside common ge31-support regimes.
forbidden_claim: All stations and regimes have uniform reliability.
recommended_handling: Surface low-support flags in model-card notes.

evidence: A-L1H.0 observed few ge33 rows; A-L1H.2 did not promote ge33 probability.
interpretation: ge33 is insufficient for current promoted claims.
recommended_handling: Require more support and separate review before any ge33 claim.
